title: The Wild Blue Yonder
writer: Andrew Geer, Charles Grayson, Richard Tregaskis
actors: Wendell Corey, Vera Ralston, Forrest Tucker
plot: In 1943, Capt. Harold Calvert is sent to Kansas to learn to fly the newest American bomber, the B-29 Superfortress. One of the instructors is Major Tom West, a cousin of the captain. Being pressurized, the B-29 can fly higher, fas...
